# 智能电网

Smart grids use digital technology to optimize power generation, distribution, and consumption. Demand response adjusts usage based on pricing. Distributed generation (like [[photovoltaic-cell]]) requires bidirectional dispatch. [[lstm-network]] and [[reinforcement-learning]] are used for load forecasting and optimization ([[smart-grid-ml]]). [[tesla-energy]] storage is key to smart grids.
